title: Benchmark GPU LDPC decoding and determine feasibility
description: Measure GPU LDPC decoding throughput vs batch size (1, 10, 50, 100, 500). Identify crossover point where GPU beats 24-core CPU. Profile GPU utilization to determine if memory-bound or compute-bound. Document findings. Decision: Go (>3x), Investigate (1.5-3x), or Abandon (<1.5x).
